creator: freebsd@wb9.se
text:
Created attachment 203304
poudriere build log

gitlab-ce from svn-branch 2019Q1 failes during staging in poudriere in my environment (latest 12.0 patch level). My guess from the attached poudriere log is that gitlab-ce has a hard dependency on rubygem-rails50-5.0.7.1, while the lastest version in the ports tree (which is pulled in as a dependency) is version 5.0.7.2.
